entities.name: THE GAMBIA
entities.description: A country in West Africa used as a case study for adaptation stocktaking.

entities.name: WEST AFRICA REGION
entities.description: The broader geographical area from which evidence was collated for the study.

entities.name: ADAPTATION OPTIONS
entities.description: Strategies identified to help agriculture and food systems adapt to climate change.

entities.name: ADAPTATION PLANNING
entities.description: The process of prioritizing and implementing adaptation options.

entities.name: SYSTEMATIC APPROACH FOR ADAPTATION STOCKTAKING
entities.description: A method combining systematic mapping and outcome-oriented assessment to identify adaptation options.

entities.name: CLIMATE-SMART AGRICULTURE
entities.description: An approach to agriculture that increases productivity, enhances resilience, and reduces GHG emissions.

entities.name: CLIMATE-RESILIENT CROP VARIETIES
entities.description: Crop types developed to withstand climate-related stresses.

entities.name: CROP DIVERSIFICATION
entities.description: The practice of growing a wider variety of crops to reduce risk.

entities.name: CLIMATE INFORMATION USE
entities.description: The application of weather and climate data to agricultural decision-making.

entities.name: WEATHER INDEXED-BASED INSURANCE
entities.description: Insurance products that pay out based on a weather index rather than individual loss assessment.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output per unit of input.

entities.name: INCOME
entities.description: The financial gain derived from agricultural activities.

entities.name: RESILIENCE TO CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: The capacity of a system to absorb disturbances and reorganize while undergoing change.

entities.name: SOIL AND WATER CONSERVATION PRACTICES
entities.description: Techniques used to prevent soil erosion and optimize water use.

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE MITIGATION
entities.description: Actions taken to reduce or prevent the emission of greenhouse gases.

entities.name: MANURE
entities.description: Organic fertilizer derived from animal waste.

entities.name: INORGANIC FERTILIZERS
entities.description: Synthetic fertilizers used to provide nutrients to crops.

entities.name: AGROFORESTRY PRACTICES
entities.description: The integration of trees and shrubs into crop and livestock systems.

entities.name: SYSTEM OF RICE INTENSIFICATION
entities.description: A climate-smart methodology for increasing the productivity of irrigated rice.

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: A cereal grain crop used in the System of Rice Intensification.

entities.name: CLIMATE RISKS
entities.description: Potential negative impacts resulting from climate change.

entities.name: GHGS EMISSIONS
entities.description: The release of greenhouse gases into the atmosphere.

entities.name: STAKEHOLDER ENGAGEMENT
entities.description: The process of involving interested parties in the selection and testing of adaptation options.

entities.name: PARTICIPATORY RESEARCH ACTION
entities.description: A research approach involving the active participation of the people being studied.

entities.name: HOUSEHOLD VULNERABILITY
entities.description: The degree to which a household is susceptible to the adverse effects of climate change.

entities.name: SOCIOECOLOGICAL CIRCUMSTANCES
entities.description: The combined social and ecological factors affecting a specific context.

entities.name: MALADAPTATION
entities.description: Adaptation actions that inadvertently increase vulnerability or risk.

entities.name: NATIONAL ADAPTATION PLAN
entities.description: A strategic framework for implementing climate adaptation at a national level.
